title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · Skill Brief: Mcp Fit
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext mcp fit increment in an extension-surface decision matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary.
Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Predict Mcp Fit
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use mcp when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary.

content.text: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

stimulus.title: Mcp Fit case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed theory case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: MCP is needed for ordinary local file edits.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary. Artifact under review: an extension-surface decision matrix.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Mcp Fit, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Build Mcp Fit evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-mcp-fit-98zado: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Mcp Fit into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-mcp-fit-98zado:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the Mcp Fit model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Mcp Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use MCP when live tools or external context must cross the agent-host boundary.
